metadata.notes: Drift experiment: within-condition homological analysis at 3 context lengths (baseline, medium, long). Baseline from Issue #14 (homology_2026-04-26.json). betweenness_eps=0.05 (matches Issue #14). medium target=155,000 tokens, verified=143,545. long target=280,000 tokens, verified=259,165.

q1_q3_convergence.description: d(Q1,Q3) decreases as context grows; Q3 converges toward Q1

magnitude_decrease.description: |M| decreases from equilateral baseline (1.6044) as card effect attenuates

q3_betweenness.description: Q3 becomes between Q1 and B4 at long context (geodesic collapse)

homology_simplification.description: MH groups simplify: MH_{1,ℓ} appears at medium, MH_2 collapses at long

baseline_probe_mapping.note: Issue #14 probe texts differ from current probes.py registry. Behavioral dimensions are equivalent. Equilateral result (all distances ≈ √ln2) holds regardless of surface text.
